title: Sign-Up OTP Links Not Being Sent
description: The sign-up OTP (one-time password) email links stopped being sent. Users attempting to register via the web-to-lead form received no OTP emails. Multiple email addresses were tested without success. The issue was subsequently resolved and verified working.
acceptance_criteria: OTP emails are reliably sent when a user submits the sign-up form
OTP links work for all valid email addresses
Email delivery is verified across multiple test addresses
middleware_changes: Fixed the OTP email sending mechanism in the sign-up flow to restore reliable delivery.
implementation_notes: Bug was reported when multiple email addresses (ryan@goodmangroupllc.com, support@datatoolspro.cm, support@goodmangroupllc.com) all failed to receive OTP links. Issue was retested and confirmed resolved.
comment_summary: Reporter retested and confirmed the OTP sign-up flow was working again, then closed the issue.
